erpGrid.title: Enterprise Systems We're Mapping
erpGrid.subtitle: Comprehensive learning paths for developers and technical professionals, and for people who want to work in Functional or Business roles. From system configuration and setup to financial operations and process management — we cover the ERP systems most in-demand across MENA.

howItWorks.title: Your Complete Guide
howItWorks.subtitle: Whether you're a student starting young, a professional looking to switch careers, or someone wanting to learn something new - we're with you every step of the way. Deep, comprehensive data gathered from thousands of sources online and carefully reviewed to answer all your questions.
howItWorks.step1Quote: I want to become an Oracle Technical Consultant or Financial Operations Manager
howItWorks.step1Detail: Share your current experience, target role (technical or Functional/Business), and timeline. We understand the MENA job market - whether you're a developer or technical professional, or want to work in Functional or Business roles - we're with you.
howItWorks.step2Quote: We analyze thousands of resources and organize the best ones for you
howItWorks.step2Detail: No more endless YouTube tabs or scattered documentation. We filter the noise and create clear roadmaps - whether for technical configuration for developers, or functional and business processes for Functional/Business users. All from deep, comprehensive data gathered from thousands of sources and carefully reviewed.
howItWorks.step3Quote: Learn with context, track progress, reach your career goal
howItWorks.step3Detail: Week-by-week guidance with the right resources at the right time. Whether you're a developer configuring systems, or a Functional/Business user managing financial and business operations - we're with you every step of the way.
howItWorks.problem1: Lost and don't know where to start
howItWorks.problem2: 20 browser tabs of scattered tutorials and documentation
howItWorks.problem3: Outdated forum posts and technical guides from 2018
howItWorks.problem4: YouTube rabbit holes with no clear path - don't know where to start whether you're technical or Functional/Business
howItWorks.problem5: Expensive courses that don't match MENA market needs or technical requirements
howItWorks.solution1: We help you choose the right ERP and learn it - whether you're a student or a professional looking to switch careers. We help developers and technical professionals, and we also help people who want to work in Functional or Business roles
howItWorks.solution2: Complete guide to all career paths - salary and company insights from deep, comprehensive data
howItWorks.solution3: We help with employment - full community and we recommend the best people to companies
howItWorks.solution4: Exams and articles at very affordable prices - suitable for students and those starting young
howItWorks.solution5: Clear paths curated by experts - data gathered from thousands of sources and carefully reviewed - bilingual support (Arabic/English)

founder.title: A Note from the Founder
founder.subtitle: Why we're building Daleel
founder.paragraph1: I built this platform because of people's many questions. Every now and then someone asks: "Where do I start?", "What should I learn?", "Which system suits me?". I found that there's a huge problem: people don't know what to do or how to start, and they have so many questions.
founder.highlight: I decided to build this platform to answer all their questions - whether they're students starting young, or professionals looking to switch careers.
founder.paragraph2: As professionals in the MENA region, we've all experienced the frustration of trying to learn ERP systems. You open YouTube and find thousands of videos. You search Google and get forum posts from 2015. You ask colleagues and get five different opinions on where to start.
founder.paragraph3: Daleel (دليل — meaning "guide" in Arabic) was born from this frustration. We're not creating another course platform. The internet already has enough content. What's missing is clarity — a guide that tells you exactly what to learn, in what order, using the best resources available. All from deep, comprehensive data gathered from thousands of sources online and carefully reviewed.
founder.paragraph4: We're starting with Oracle Cloud ERP because it's the most in-demand system in the Gulf region. But we're building this with you — the community will decide which ERP systems we add next.
founder.paragraph5: This is an early-stage startup. We're honest about that. But we're serious about the mission: making ERP learning accessible, structured, and career-focused for everyone - students who want to start young, professionals looking to switch careers. We help developers and technical professionals, and we also help people who want to work in Functional or Business roles.
founder.teamTagline: Building from the MENA region, for the MENA region
